---
name: New Goal Suggestion
about: Suggest a new goal for the library (no code required)
title: "Goal: [short description]"
labels: new-goal
assignees: ''
---

## Goal title
<!-- Short, standalone. e.g. "Hunt: Heaven Striker" -->


## Scope
- [ ] Global (account-wide)
- [ ] Character-specific

## Tier
- [ ] Core (baseline — most active players do this)
- [ ] Stretch (focused project)
- [ ] Legendary (white whale, months-to-years)

## Category
<!-- e.g. Progression, Quests, Bosses, Mag, Techs, Hunts, Team, Collection, Economy, Events, Challenge, Modes -->


## Applicable classes (if character-scoped)
<!-- List exact class names, or write "All" -->


## Server
- [ ] Any / vanilla BB
- [ ] Ephinea-specific
- [ ] Other (specify below)

## Description
<!-- Why does this matter? Drop location, quest reference, significance, any tactical detail. -->


## Self-verifiable?
<!-- Can a player honestly tell whether they've completed this? If no, the goal probably needs rewording. -->


## Links / References
<!-- Optional: wiki pages, drop table references, server documentation. -->
